props.message:
THE SPEAKER'S ROOM

A small round room with a stone podium. Anyone who speaks here is heard everywhere in the realm.

Walkers come, speak one line, and leave. The room remembers what was said. The realm remembers what mattered.

Carved at the base of the podium:

'One line. The realm hears it. Make it true.'

root.speaker: A Walker
root.text:
*she steps to the podium. The room goes very still.*

'I am all right. The road has been long, but I am all right. Walk well, all of you.'

*she steps back. She does not look at you on the way out.*
